justification.personality: The film portrays him as a background presence, often just 'Moody' observing, losing the deep, complex, and often unreliable nature shown in the books.
justification.narrative_role: His role as a key figure in the Ministry/Auror world is present, but his specific function in the plot (especially in relation to the main mystery) is diluted.
justification.motivations: His core motivation—fighting dark magic and protecting the innocent—is maintained, but the depth of his paranoia and commitment to the fight is less explored.
justification.character_arc: The film gives him very little personal arc; he is more of a plot device or a recurring fixture rather than a character undergoing significant change.

comparative.key_observations: The film utilizes Moody more as a visual prop or a momentary authority figure, stripping away much of the textual depth and complexity of his character.
